comment: Revenue trend is increasing across the observed periods.
EBITDA/PBDIT is improving, consistent with stronger operating earnings.
Working capital is positive and improving.
Debt / EBITDA is increasing, indicating rising leverage.
Debt / Cash Flow is trending down, which is supportive for repayment capacity.
Operating cash flow is improving, consistent with stronger debt-servicing capacity.
Cash on hand is increasing, which supports day-to-day liquidity.
Net worth is increasing, which is supportive of credit quality.
Equity infusion is increasing, indicating greater support from shareholders / owners.
Free cash flow is improving, supporting internal debt repayment.
WC positive only after including cash; underlying gap exists but cash covers it
Pricing is within a normal SME risk range.
